user.title: Connect to LightNVR
user.description: Enter your LightNVR server's address and login. A **viewer** account is recommended - this integration only ever reads data, it never changes camera settings.

data_description.verify_ssl: Leave off if you're using LightNVR's default self-signed certificate. Turn on only if you've installed a real certificate (Settings → Security in the app).

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to LightNVR
reauth_confirm.description: The saved password for {host} no longer works. Enter the current password to reconnect.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the server. Check the host and port.
error.ssl_error: The server's certificate isn't trusted. If this is LightNVR's default self-signed certificate, turn off "Verify SSL certificate".
error.unknown: Unexpected error - see the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.already_configured: This LightNVR server is already configured.
